artist.name: Lauren-Michael Sellers
artist.tagline: Nashville singer-songwriter · Team Reba · The Voice Season 26

upcomingRelease.title: Firefighter
upcomingRelease.description: A new single built on heat, heart, and resilience — pre-save now and be first to hear it when it drops.

releases.title: This Is Hell
releases.description: Latest original single — raw, honest storytelling from the heart of Nashville.

releases.title: Slow Dance
releases.description: An intimate original that blends contemporary singer-songwriter pop with classic country warmth.

releases.title: Hold On To Me
releases.description: Emotionally resonant cover showcasing her vocal range and connection to vulnerable storytelling.

releases.title: Take Me Back
releases.description: With Song House — a warm, authentic country release rooted in Nashville storytelling.

voiceHighlights.note: Prompted a massive reaction and showcased her strong background in worship music.
Earned widespread praise for connecting with vulnerable, storytelling country music.

tourNote: Sample dates for layout — replace in data/site.json with confirmed shows.

merch.headline: Wear the story
merch.intro: For independent artists, merch isn’t just swag — it helps fund studio time, touring, and the next song you haven’t heard yet. Every tee, hat, and mug directly supports the music.
merch.shopNote: Placeholder items for now — swap in your real store link when ready.

items.name: Team Reba Red Chair Tee
items.description: Navy tee with a subtle red-chair emblem — for everyone who turned four chairs.

items.name: Wide-Brim Nashville Hat
items.description: Black felt-style hat for stage nights, songwriter rounds, and dramatic exits.

items.name: Firefighter Flame Mug
items.description: Ceramic mug with flame wrap — pre-game your pre-save with something hot.

items.name: “Oceans” Sunday Hoodie
items.description: Oversized oatmeal hoodie with soft vintage wash — blind-audition energy.

items.name: Emotional Support Mic Keychain
items.description: Mini mic on a sturdy clip — for keys, bags, or nervous hands before go-time.

items.name: “I Am Not Okay” Tote
